author: glasp-co
description: Import your Glasp highlights and notes into your vault.

manifest.author: Glasp
manifest.description: Import your Glasp web and Kindle highlights and notes into your vault.
manifest.name: Glasp

name: Glasp

releases.author: kazuki-sf
releases.description:
## What's new in 0.2.0

### ✨ Features
- **Kindle highlights import** — bring your Kindle book highlights and notes into Obsidian, into their own separate output folder (kept independent from web highlights).
- **Customizable templates** — define your own Markdown layout and frontmatter for web and Kindle notes under *Advanced* settings (defaults are used when left empty).
- **Easier access-token setup** — a labeled **Copy link** button to open the token page in your default browser.

### 🔒 Security & maintenance
- Patched `handlebars` to 4.7.9 and removed the `moment` dependency.
- Upgraded the toolchain to Node 22.

### 📄 Docs
- Rewrote the README (features, settings, templates, privacy, and development).

**Install:** download `main.js` and `manifest.json` below into `[YourVault]/.obsidian/plugins/glasp/`, or update from Obsidian Community Plugins.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
